sentences.arabic: زَارَ رَئِيسُ الدَّوْلَةِ الْجَارَةَ لِتَعْزِيزِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ الثُّنَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Predsjednik je posjetio susjednu zemlju radi jačanja bilateralnih odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: The President visited the neighboring country to strengthen bilateral relations.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَقْبَلَهُ الْمَسْؤُولُونَ فِي الْمَطَارِ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnici su ga na aerodromu dočekali uz toplu dobrodošlicu.
sentences.translationEn: Officials welcomed him at the airport with a warm reception.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشَ الطَّرَفَانِ مَوَاضِيعَ تَتَعَلَّقُ بِالتِّجَارَةِ وَالْأَمْنِ.
sentences.translation: Dvije strane su razgovarale o temama vezanim za trgovinu i sigurnost.
sentences.translationEn: The two sides discussed topics related to trade and security.

sentences.arabic: وَقَّعَ الْوَزِيرَانِ اتِّفَاقِيَّةً جَدِيدَةً لِلتَّعَاوُنِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Dva ministra su potpisala novi sporazum o kulturnoj saradnji.
sentences.translationEn: The two ministers signed a new agreement for cultural cooperation.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ هَذِهِ الزِّيَارَةُ خُطْوَةً إِيجَابِيَّةً لِلِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova posjeta se smatra pozitivnim korakom za stabilnost u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: This visit is considered a positive step for stability in the region.
